changes.text: Enhanced Core Test with reading passage extraction and grouped parts support (e.g., Part 1, 2, 3).
Redesigned Core Test UI to render passages as dedicated 'Info' steps (marked 'I') with bold formatting support.
Implemented real-time model routing with failure tracking (unretriable, rate-limited, wrong format) and automatic fallback to OpenRouter.
Added automatic Race Mode activation when multiple models experience unusual failure rates.
Introduced 'Blind-Checklist': a personalized pre-exam guide generated from chats, quizzes, and Oracle Memory metrics.
Optimized checklist generation with smart/agentic model racing and intelligent result caching.
Hardened state management: chat drafts now clear on reset, and routing memory resets on logout or after inactivity.
Improved Quiz FRQ error handling: model failures are now correctly flagged instead of being marked as incorrect answers.
Professionalized analytics summary wording and added a dedicated loading screen after test submission.
Refined prompt engineering to remove redundant question numbering and ensure 100% information capture from documents.
Updated follow-up and explain-further selection actions to render linked UI containers instead of raw selected-question text while preserving existing backend flows.
Added selection-section highlighting when users click the new follow-up UI chips.
Made web search failures non-blocking so chat requests continue with a backend prompt flag for uncertainty-aware responses.
Refined prompt guard routing so heuristics only stop jailbreak attempts, model detection handles advanced guard and web-search decisions, and jailbreak candidates always disable web search.
Updated web search quota counting so quota is consumed only after search results are successfully retrieved.
Updated quiz-to-chat follow-ups for wrong answers to render UI chips instead of raw text injection while keeping backend behavior unchanged.
Updated deprecated Gemini preview model to GA endpoint to prevent API failures after May 25, 2026.
Refactored model handling to use abstract flags (agentic, fast, smart, balanced) with backend-based resolution.
Added strict typing, validation, and documentation for model flags to improve reliability and prevent invalid usage.
Enhanced guard and web search fallback logic, allowing responses to continue safely when web search fails.
Migrated Core Test prompt orchestration to Supabase Edge Functions while preserving compatibility with existing production flows.
Added per-topic memory deletion controls in the dashboard with confirmation prompts and immediate UI refresh.
Tightened Oracle Memory topic creation rules and filtered empty topic entries from dashboard and quiz topic selectors to reduce hallucinated topic noise.
Updated dashboard summaries, strengths, and weaknesses panels to preview the first 5 items with independent see more / see less expansion controls.
Expanded Quiz configuration with topic selection, current-topic defaulting, mastery-popup topic routing, and guarded start behavior when no valid topic is selected.
Implemented per-topic Quiz configuration caching in sessionStorage and added loading-locked start states while quiz configs refresh.
Cleared persisted Core Test and Quiz session state on logout to prevent cross-session carryover.
Added a direct Log out action inside the Profile page.
Added confirmation prompt before chat reset with full language support to prevent accidental data loss.
Expanded chat reset validation to include both chatHistory and oracleMemory for more reliable state handling.
Enhanced Exam Mode performance with model racing between gemini-2.5-flash and gemini-3.1-flash-preview under adaptive trigger conditions.
Introduced full Exam Practice system simulating real-world conditions (timed, restricted help, no live feedback).
Added support for PDF, PNG, TXT, and DOCX in exam processing with automated text extraction and mark scheme parsing.
Implemented multi-tier Help Level System (0-3) ranging from strict exam mode to full solutions with explanations.
Enhanced AI grading logic using uploaded mark schemes with score, grade boundary estimation, and performance breakdown.
Added 'examMemory' integration to track weak areas and mistake patterns, syncing with Oracle Memory for future learning.
Integrated post-exam Review Mode with identified mistakes, improvement suggestions, and progressive reveal UX.
Added full DOCX export support for exam results, including analytics, performance breakdown, and answers.
Updated model orchestration: switched key evaluation tasks from gemini-2.5-flash to gemini-3.1-flash-preview.
Refined anti-cheat mechanisms including tab-switch detection, warning banners, and timer pausing on window leave.
Resolved race conditions in file uploads by disabling overlapping model requests and improving button feedback.
Smoothed UI latency and added loading animations for more responsive feedback during complex AI tasks.
Switched donation system from BMAC to Ko-fi (PayPal-based) due to reliability issues.
Added support for pasting screenshots (Ctrl+V) directly into chat input as image attachments.
Introduced gemini-3.1-flash-lite-preview as a core model across chat, quiz, cron, and query generation workflows.
Reworked orchestration to a Gemini-first architecture with OpenRouter as a validated last-resort fallback.
Upgraded racing logic from 'first response wins' to 'first valid response wins' for more reliable outputs.
Resolved hallucination issue in web search branch by preventing model calls when search quota is exceeded and returning a controlled response.
Enhanced system prompts to reduce out-of-date or fabricated answers when user queries exceed model knowledge cutoff.
Removed LiquidAI integrations due to shallow response quality.
Deprecated minimax2.5 due to high latency and frequent unavailability.
Optimized web search query generation using Gemini models with pre-validation to reduce quota waste.
Migrated web search provider to Tavily with Jigsawstack as a backup for improved reliability.
Refined mastery check flow to limit repetition, introduce adaptive phrasing, and provide clearer fallback paths.
Fixed mobile UI issue where uploaded files appeared beside text instead of stacking properly.
Added 'Follow up' interaction mode in selection popup, allowing contextual queries without auto-send.
Resolved UI overlap issues in follow-up container with dynamic spacing and layout adjustments.
Improved overall response quality and learning adaptation by refining model selection and orchestration behavior.
Introduced Gemini 3.1 Flash Lite for faster and more accurate responses across chat, quiz, and query generation flows.
Removed LiquidAI integrations due to inconsistent and low-quality responses, replacing it with Gemini 3.1 Flash Lite.
Introduced LiquidAI Instruct and MiniMax 2.5 for race modes, replacing StepFun 3.5 now that the free tier is no longer available.
Resolved Quiz level state consistency issues across supported languages.
Refined Markdown rendering logic to handle blockquotes and currency-like symbols more reliably without false formatting triggers.
Enhanced code block rendering for more consistent multi-language syntax highlighting and display behavior.
Replaced unnecessary text-based controls with contextual icons for a cleaner and more intuitive reading experience.
Expanded the learning engine with Feynman reinforcement, exam-style adaptation, wider mastery branching, and structured Oracle Memory JSON returns.
Added short-query fast branching to Balanced race mode for low-friction learning prompts under 6 words.
Introduced the learner dashboard with profile insights, learning-efficiency tracking, topic drilldowns, strengths, weaknesses, and integrated session summary download.
Upgraded session summary DOCX generation to consume richer structured Oracle Memory data.
Migrated key prompt logic to Supabase Edge Functions for tighter backend-controlled orchestration.
Updated repository licensing, README, and UI content to reflect the new mixed-license project framework.
Refined Changelog and Documentation UI with a cleaner visual structure and more consistent content presentation.
Resolved scroll window sticking issues affecting Changelog and Documentation panels during navigation.
Improved layout behavior and viewport responsiveness for a smoother reading and browsing experience.
Enhanced Docs interface robustness to reduce UI friction and improve overall usability stability.
Migrated AI orchestration to Supabase Edge Functions with AES-GCM-256 encryption and zero-client API key exposure.
Introduced context-aware 'Explain on Select' for instant Socratic follow-ups from highlighted text.
Integrated JigsawStack Web Search API for real-time factual grounding and web parsing.
Developed multi-modal execution pipeline with 5 specialized routing modes (Standard, Fast, Balanced, Agentic, Web Search).
Implemented Prompt Security Layer with jailbreak detection and pedagogical input sanitation.
Added real-time Loading Status Text Bar to visualize AI cognitive processing stages.
Upgraded core stack to React 19, Vite 6, and TypeScript 5.8 with non-blocking UI architecture.
Enhanced Socratic prompts to prioritize conceptual derivation before formal explanation.
Expanded Math & Science scaffolding with clearer step-by-step verification checks.
Tightened response structure to resolve formatting inconsistencies in LaTeX equations and technical lists.
Refined chat input UI to expand dynamically without obstructing active conversation content.
Expanded Socratic engine techniques including flip questioning and abstract reasoning transitions.
Enhanced adaptive prompt logic for improved confidence-based pacing in Quiz modes.
Introduced race-based model routing for low-latency, adaptive response selection.
Integrated StepFun 3.5 model into the adaptive routing pipeline.
Implemented local draft preservation for prompts and responses across tab switches or closures.
Hardened system resilience and failure recovery handling under high-load conditions.
Enhanced multi-language support and localization handling for global learners.
Smoothed Socratic dialogue flow for better reasoning continuity.
Resolved edge-case stability issues to ensure more robust chatbot responses.
Launched Academic Oracle AI Learning System.
Integrated Quiz Platform with closed-feedback learning loops.
Unified routing architecture with route-driven state management.
Implemented multi-model fallback chain with dynamic load balancing.
Separated quota handling between Chat and Quiz systems.
Refined AI prompts for deeper contextual understanding and response quality.
Integrated full website ecosystem.
Fixed various API-related bugs and connectivity issues.
Reduced response latency and refined UI animations.
Added skip option for initial API setup.
Resolved routing-related bugs in the initial build.
